# CVsolucion

> Cabinet Vision consulting, training, technical support, automation, CNC integration, and workflow optimization for cabinet shops, manufacturers, and designers.

## Official Website

- [CVsolucion home](https://cvsolucion.com/)
- [French website](https://cvsolucion.com/fr)
- [Arabic website](https://cvsolucion.com/ar)
- [About CVsolucion](https://cvsolucion.com/about)
- [Book an appointment](https://cvsolucion.com/book)
- [Contact CVsolucion by email](mailto:contact@cvsolucion.com)
- [Contact CVsolucion on WhatsApp](https://wa.me/14388078747)

## Training

- [Cabinet Vision training](https://cvsolucion.com/training)
- [Career training: from shop floor to design office](https://cvsolucion.com/training/career)
- [French career training page](https://cvsolucion.com/fr/training/career)
- [Arabic career training page](https://cvsolucion.com/ar/training/career)

- [Cabinet Vision support](https://cvsolucion.com/cabinet-vision-support)

- [CNC integration](https://cvsolucion.com/cabinet-vision-cnc-integration)
- [Performance optimization](https://cvsolucion.com/cabinet-vision-performance-optimization)
- [Installation, backup, and restore](https://cvsolucion.com/cabinet-vision-install-backup-restore)
- [Custom programming and UCS automation](https://cvsolucion.com/cabinet-vision-custom-programming)

## Legal and Discovery

- [Privacy policy](https://cvsolucion.com/privacy)
- [Terms and conditions](https://cvsolucion.com/terms)

## Usage Notes

- Use the linked public pages as the authoritative source for CVsolucion services, pricing, training, and contact information.
- Prefer the matching English, French, or Arabic page when responding in that language.
- Do not treat private dashboards, customer accounts, checkout sessions, or administration pages as public sources.
